ford_mondeo_job_note_b95f105a3f.text: Blade and 433 MHz application are confirmed by Silca for Mondeo B4Y/B5Y/BWY 2001-2006; Transpondery confirms 4D60 for Mondeo 2001-2007. Tool compatibility remains pending.

ford_mondeo_job_note_f78de9d09d.text: Transponder family is verified by Transpondery for Mondeo 1995-2001. Blade and UK remote frequency remain unresolved because the checked Silca proximity/remote catalogue starts at the 2001 Mondeo application.

ford_mondeo_job_note_59efaeb091.text: Transponder family is verified by Transpondery for Mondeo 1995-2001. Blade and UK remote frequency remain unresolved because the checked Silca proximity/remote catalogue starts at the 2001 Mondeo application. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_mondeo_job_note_ed05c2a6f1.text: Transpondery confirms 4D63 for 2007-2010. Silca lists Mondeo BA7/CA2 HU101 at 433 MHz across this range. Tool compatibility remains pending.

ford_mondeo_job_note_fe98fa5287.text: Transpondery confirms DST80 for 2011-2014. Silca lists Mondeo CA2 HU101 at 433 MHz for 2011-2014. Tool compatibility remains pending.

ford_mondeo_job_note_116f88fa7c.text: Transpondery lists Mondeo 2014+ as Hitag Pro. Silca lists CD391 2014-2020 and 2017-2022 with HU101 and 433 MHz. Tool and FDRS requirements remain to be mapped separately.

ford_mondeo_job_note_96528e1839.text: Use only where passive start is confirmed. Blade, transponder and frequency are verified for the facelift range.

ford_mondeo_job_note_ef15e4c6ee.text: Use only where passive start is confirmed. Key family, HU101 emergency blade and 433 MHz application are verified for this range.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
